title: Groovier Discs
description: Retextures minecraft's music discs to be even, and on par with current textures
body:
## Compatibility
This resourcepack should be compatible from 1.16.x to 1.21.x!

Future compatibility for other mods is planned - if you want to see other modded discs in this style i recommend checking out [Raspberry Flavoured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured)! I work as an artist there so any resource packs i post usually are a port of my assets i made for it.



## Planned Compatibility

| Mods                 | Current Compatibility |
|----------------------|:---------------------:|
| Oreganized           |          ✘            |
| Sully's Mod          |          ✘            |
| Windswept            |          ✘            |
| Neapolitan           |          ✘            |
| Environmental        |          ✘            |
| Upgrade Aquatic      |          ✘            |
| Etched               |          ✘            |
| Ecologics            |          ✘            |
| Quark (Ambience Discs) |        ✘            |
